scripts.name: kaine
scripts.code:
#SingleInstance Force

Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Chrome, OpenChrome
Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Notepad, OpenNotepad
Menu, MyMenu, Add, Open Calculator, OpenCalc

^h::
Menu, MyMenu, Show
return

OpenChrome:
Run, chrome.exe
return

OpenNotepad:
Run, notepad.exe
return

OpenCalc:
Run, calc.exe
return
